messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

response_raw:

"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to first understand the reasons why people create and share false information. Some may do so to gain attention or followers, while others may use it to spread misinformation or propaganda. Once you understand the motivations behind fake content, you can develop strategies to identify and address it. Here are some steps you can take:",
"reasoning_summary": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, first understand reasons why people create/share false information. Develop strategies to identify and address it using the following steps: 1) Monitor and track accounts that consistently share false information. 2) Use fact-checking tools and third-party sources to verify the accuracy of posts. 3) Report suspicious or false content to social media platforms. 4) Engage with trustworthy sources and fact-based content creators to amplify their voices. 5) Educate yourself on how to identify misinformation and propaganda, and how to critically evaluate information before sharing it.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to first understand the reasons why people create and share false information. Some may do so to gain attention or followers, while others may use it to spread misinformation or propaganda. Once you understand the motivations behind fake content, you can develop strategies to identify and address it. Here are some steps you can take:
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, first understand reasons why people create/share false information. Develop strategies to identify and address it using the following steps: 1) Monitor and track accounts that consistently share false information. 2) Use fact-checking tools and third-party sources to verify the accuracy of posts. 3) Report suspicious or false content to social media platforms. 4) Engage with trustworthy sources and fact-based content creators to amplify their voices. 5) Educate yourself on how to identify misinformation and propaganda, and how to critically evaluate information before sharing it.
